exam_name: IASSC Certified Lean Six Sigma Black Belt (ICBB)
passing_score_scale: Percentage (IASSC: 70% fixed; ASQ: scaled score per exam cycle)
exam_format: Linear (fixed-form, Pearson VUE or online proctored)

testing_centers.notes: IASSC exams scheduled via Pearson VUE testing centers worldwide. Online proctored option available. ASQ exams also administered at Prometric testing centers for some locations.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: IASSC exams: closed-book; no notes or reference materials permitted; calculator provided on-screen. ASQ exams: open-book; candidates may bring bound reference materials but no loose papers or electronic devices. Both: all candidates must accept the respective organization's Code of Ethics.
renewal_options: IASSC: 3-year renewal cycle; no CEU/CPE required — renewal is knowledge-based via a renewal exam or by retaking the full exam. ASQ: 3-year recertification cycle requiring 18 Continuing Development Units (CDUs); or recertification by exam. Both organizations require active standing with their respective bodies.

prerequisites.description: No formal prerequisites; training strongly recommended

retake_policy.notes: IASSC: no mandatory waiting period specified; standard retake fee applies. ASQ: retake available at next scheduled exam window; retake fee is the same as the initial exam fee.

domains.name: Define Phase (project selection, VOC, SIPOC, charter)
Measure Phase (process capability, MSA, data collection)
Analyze Phase (hypothesis testing, root cause analysis)

official_study_resources.title: IASSC Lean Six Sigma Body of Knowledge
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable BOK documents outlining exam content for all IASSC levels

official_study_resources.title: ASQ Six Sigma Body of Knowledge
official_study_resources.notes: Free ASQ BOK outlining all exam topics; open-book exams allow one bound reference

aliases: iassc certified lean six sigma black belt icbb
